_schema.description: Manifest entry schema for self-improve harness targets
_schema.path: Absolute or home-relative file path to improve (required)
_schema.weight: Priority weight where higher means checked more often (default 1.0)
_schema.category: Grouping label for reporting and filtering (e.g. 'memory', 'skill', 'config') (optional)
_schema.auto_approve: If true, validated changes are applied immediately. If false, requires manual approval (default false)

_comment: Example: a skill file set to auto-approve after validation
Example: general documentation that can be auto-approved

_warning: Do not auto-approve sensitive files like MEMORY.md, credentials, auth config, policy files, or business logic. Always require manual review.
_comment: Example: memory file that requires manual approval before changes
